creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Here is patch for this two ports:
- x11-toolkits/py-wxPython28
- x11-toolkits/py-wxPython28-common

changes:
- update to latest stable version (2.8.12.1)
- store distfile in distfiles/python
- remove stale patch (patch-wxpython-fedora11)

changelog:
http://www.wxpython.org/recentchanges.php (scroll to 2.8.10.1 - 2.8.12.1)

tinderbuild logs:
8.2: http://host5.webstroy.ru/tb/8.2/py27-wxPython-2.8.12.1.log
8.2: http://host5.webstroy.ru/tb/8.2/py27-wxPython-common-2.8.12.1.log
8.2: http://host5.webstroy.ru/tb/8.2/py27-wxPython-unicode-2.8.12.1.log

Hope this patch will find it's way to 9.0R DVD. It should be placed to /usr/ports/x11-toolkits. Then patch -p0 < py-wxPython-2.8.12.1.diff.txt

Patch is refused by gnats because of it's size, so i placed it here:
http://host5.webstroy.ru/py-wxPython-2.8.12.1.diff.txt
